tickets.title: BL001
tickets.description:
[CRITICAL] The connection pool to the Registrar's live database is intermittently dropping connections, causing the real-time class capacity check feature (US003) to time out and crash the roadmap page. 

Acceptance Criteria:
[ ] Pass if the connection pool is stabilized and maintains a 99.9% uptime during peak simulation.
[ ] Pass if the system handles temporary database timeouts gracefully without throwing a 500 error page to the student.

tickets.title: US002
tickets.description:
As a Student, I want the system to show a warning alert if I select a class that starts at 8:00 AM, so that I can avoid oversleeping and missing lectures. [cite: 77, 128]

Acceptance Criteria: [cite: 81]
[ ] Pass if the system triggers a visible yellow warning pop-up saying "Warning: This class starts at 8:00 AM" immediately when an 8:00 AM class is dropped into the roadmap. [cite: 82, 83]
[ ] Pass if the system still allows the student to keep the course in the roadmap after acknowledging the w

tickets.title: US003
tickets.description:
As a Student, I want the roadmap builder to block me from adding a course if its slots are completely full in the live database, so that I don't plan for unavailable classes. [cite: 77, 130]

Acceptance Criteria: [cite: 81]
[ ] Pass if the system cross-checks the current enrollment database and blocks the addition of a class when its capacity is 100% full for the upcoming semester. [cite: 82, 83]
[ ] Pass if an error message "Class is Full" is displayed, preventing the block from being added to

tickets.title: US004
tickets.description:
As a Student, I want my academic roadmap to be completely private, so that no other students can see or access my personal schedule. [cite: 77, 129]

Acceptance Criteria: [cite: 81]
[ ] Pass if a logged-in student can only view their own academic roadmap dashboard. [cite: 82, 83]
[ ] Pass if any direct URL access or API request to view another student's roadmap ID by a regular student account returns an "Access Denied / 403 Unauthorized" error. [cite: 82, 83]

tickets.title: US005
tickets.description:
As an Administrator, I want to manually override prerequisite course requirements for special student cases and have the override automatically logged, so that I can provide flexible advising while maintaining a clear audit trail. [cite: 77, 127, 129]

Acceptance Criteria: [cite: 81]
[ ] Pass if an authorized advisor account can click an "Override" button to force-add a Course B even if the student hasn't completed Course A. [cite: 82, 83]
[ ] Pass if the system successfully saves the override a

analysis.ambiguity1: The app should force users to select a safe zone before they can chat.
analysis.ambiguity2: Also, I want to be able to auction items, not just set a fixed price.
